ethos_paragraphs.text: Life on the island has a way of simplifying things.

The days are slower, the schedule is lighter, and getting dressed should be just as easy. We've curated a collection of effortless essentials designed for warm weather, coastal living, and everything that comes with both.
These are the pieces you'll wear here—and pack for everywhere else.

essentials_intro: Everything you need for looking great on your Vineyard getaway — and nothing you don't.

packing_list.note: Fine-gauge polos and sweaters for porch light and salt air.
Breathable shirting for the heat off the harbor.
For brick sidewalks and boat decks alike.
Light on the foot, all day.
For the short walk to the water.
The small finishing things, kept under glass.
Pulled from the cabinet for the glare.

location_text: Dune / Man — a shingled corner on Winter Street, Edgartown, just off Main Street.
